description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a pelican job that uses the python:3.5 Docker image, runs `echo \"fr_FR.UTF-8 UTF-8\" > /etc/locale.gen`, `apt-get update`, `apt-get install -y locales`, `pip install pelican`, and `make publish`, then stores the generated `output` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the registry.gitlab.com/hashbangfr/docker_archlinux:salt image, runs only on the master branch, depends on the pelican job, and executes `/usr/local/bin/salt-notif.py /gitlabci/build project=${CI_PROJECT_NAME} branch=${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME} ci_project_id=${CI_PROJECT_ID} ci_build_id=${CI_BUILD_ID}`, publishing the same `output` artifact. Tag the deploy job with the runner tag `deploy`.
